# Squid Agent

> Squid Agent researches current documentation, APIs, and external facts; guides complex builds through a plan-and-approval workflow; and generates exportable Vite + React applications from prompts, screenshots, and website references. The product emphasizes visible model credit estimates, reversible code checkpoints, generated-file diagnostics, and verified export bundles.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://squidagent.app/): Build a React application with Squid Agent.
- [Documentation](https://squidagent.app/docs): Practical build guides, example apps, prompt collections, workflows, and product details.
- [Comparisons](https://squidagent.app/compare): Evidence-led comparisons of current AI app builders.
- [Guides](https://squidagent.app/blog): Production-minded guidance for AI-generated React apps.
- [Benchmarks](https://squidagent.app/benchmarks): Reproducible AI app builder evaluation methods.
- [Contact](https://squidagent.app/contact): Support, billing, privacy, and security contact information.

## Current Comparisons

- [Squid vs Lovable](https://squidagent.app/compare/squid-vs-lovable): React export, GitHub sync, credits, version history, quality evidence, and product fit.
- [Squid vs Lovable for Startups](https://squidagent.app/compare/squid-vs-lovable-for-startups): Startup-focused comparison on speed, ownership, cost, and portability.
- [Squid vs Bolt.new](https://squidagent.app/compare/squid-vs-bolt): Tokens, project export, GitHub, version history, verification, and product fit.
- [Squid vs Bolt.new for Agencies](https://squidagent.app/compare/squid-vs-bolt-for-agencies): Agency-focused comparison on deliverables, review loops, and rollback behavior.
- [Squid vs Squid AI (getsquid.ai)](https://squidagent.app/compare/squid-vs-getsquid-ai): Brand disambiguation and delivery posture for production handoff.
- [Squid vs v0](https://squidagent.app/compare/squid-vs-v0): React and Next.js workflows, code export, Git, checkpoints, and quality evidence.
- [Squid vs v0 for Design-led teams](https://squidagent.app/compare/squid-vs-v0-for-design-led-teams): Design-led comparison on design-system fit, edit cadence, and deployment workflows.

## Guides

- [Why AI App Builders Burn Credits](https://squidagent.app/blog/why-ai-app-builders-burn-credits): Measure the complete cost of reaching an accepted result.
- [AI Coding Tool Comparison with Credits](https://squidagent.app/blog/ai-coding-tool-comparison-with-credits): Decision framework for output quality, spend, portability, and verification.
- [How to Evaluate AI-Generated React Code](https://squidagent.app/blog/how-to-evaluate-ai-generated-react-code): A production-minded React acceptance checklist.
- [Screenshot-to-React Is Table Stakes](https://squidagent.app/blog/screenshot-to-react-is-table-stakes): What to measure beyond the first visual preview.
- [How to Export an AI-Generated React App](https://squidagent.app/blog/how-to-export-ai-generated-react-app): Validate a clean, portable handoff.
- [Export React app from AI](https://squidagent.app/blog/export-react-app-from-ai): Validate ownership and delivery with a practical export checklist.
- [How We Verify Code](https://squidagent.app/blog/how-we-verify-code): Step-by-step explanation of Squid verification layers.
- [What to Check After AI Generation](https://squidagent.app/blog/what-to-check-after-ai-generation): Practical post-generation receipt for safe continuation.
- [From Screenshot to Production React](https://squidagent.app/blog/from-screenshot-to-production-react): Convert a visual reference into responsive and functional requirements.

## Benchmarks

- [Screenshot-to-React Benchmark](https://squidagent.app/benchmarks/screenshot-to-react): A 100-point rubric for visual fidelity, responsiveness, semantics, interactions, accessibility, edit containment, recovery, export readiness, and usage transparency.

## Product Facts

- Live web research grounds answers and generated apps in current documentation, API references, package guidance, and time-sensitive external facts.
- Plan mode asks targeted questions, builds a structured project specification, presents it for explicit approval, and begins code generation after approval.
- Full exports include generated source, required support files, package and build configuration, README, manifest, quality report, verification report, and starter deployment configs.
- Generated-file checks cover internal imports, export/import compatibility, protected paths, and baseline accessibility warnings.
- Restoring a prior generated version creates a new checkpoint instead of mutating the historical result.
- Comparison pages are dated snapshots and link to official competitor documentation.

## Brand Identity

- [What is Squid Agent?](https://squidagent.app/what-is-squid-agent): Clear product identity, workflow boundaries, and what makes this solution distinct.
- Squid Agent is a separate product from Squid AI (getsquid.ai).
- Squid Agent is an export-first AI React app builder with plan mode, usage visibility, quality diagnostics, and explicit version checkpoints.
